title: -Contract No. 10271 Amendment: Lease of 1521-1535 University Avenue

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager or designee to execute an amendment
to Contract No. 10271 with Satellite Affordable Housing Associates (SAHA) through
June 30, 2031, adding $1,200,000 for a total contract amount of $2,709,949.20, to fund
lease payments for 1521-1535 University Avenue.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Funds for the scope of work in the amount of $1,200,000 will be provided from the
Mental Health Services Act Funds 011, 315, and 316. Funding will be available in the
Fiscal Year 2026 budget, pending approval of Annual Appropriations Ordinance
Number One.
sections.current_situation:
The leasing of 1521-1535 University Avenue is a Strategic Plan Priority Project,
advancing our goal to provide state-of-the-art, well-maintained infrastructure, amenities,
and facilities. The Health, Housing, and Community Services Department’s Mental
Health Division uses the building for the Family, Youth, and Children’s (FYC) clinic, as
well as office space for multiple staff units within the Division.
sections.background:
The City’s Health, Housing, and Community Services Department’s Mental Health
Division began to lease 1521-1535 University Avenue in 2016, due to an environmental
emergency which shut down the Adult clinic located at 2640 Martin Luther King Jr. Way.
Once renovations were completed, Adult clinic staff moved back and FYC staff moved
into 1521-1535 University Avenue, ending the lease at 3282 Adeline Street where FYC
had been located for many years. The current location at University Avenue has proven
more convenient for clients and their families, is centrally located and close to public
transportation, and the vendor SAHA has been a competent landlord and property
manager throughout the lease. On February 23, 2016, Council authorized a 10-year
lease allowing the City two (2) consecutive options to extend the lease term for an
additional five (5) years each.

Contract No. 10271 Amendment: Lease of 1521—1535 University Avenue CONSENT CALENDAR
October 14, 2025
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
There are no identifiable environmental effects, sustainability opportunities, or climate
impacts associated with the subject of this report.
sections.rationale:
Mental Health staff are currently using the buildings at 1521-1535 University Avenue as
both office and clinical space, and plan to do so for the foreseeable future. SAHA has
been a competent property management partner throughout the lease thus far.
sections.alternatives:
Council may choose not to approve this contract; however, the Mental Health Division
may not be able to retain its current location for FYC.
CONTACT PERSON
Jeffrey Buell, Manager of Mental Health Services, (510) 981-7682
Conor Murphy, Associate Management Analyst, HHCS, (510) 981-7611
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
CONTRACT NO. 10271 AMENDMENT: LEASE OF 1521-1535 UNIVERSITY AVENUE
WHEREAS, vendor Satellite Affordable Housing Associates (SAHA) has leased office
space at 1521-1535 University Avenue to the City’s Health, Housing, and Community
Services Department’s Mental Health Division and proven to be a competent property
manager; and
WHEREAS, the Master Lease and Property Management Agreement for 1521-1535
University Avenue was approved by the Council of the City of Berkeley by Ordinance No.
7,459-N.S. (adopted February 23, 2016); and
WHEREAS, funding for these services and supports are available in the Fiscal Year 2026
budget, subject to adoption of the Annual Appropriations Ordinance Number One.
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
City Manager or designee is authorized to execute a contract amendment with SAHA to
fund the lease of 1521-1535 University Avenue through June 30, 2031, in an amount not
to exceed $2,709,949.20 and funded through the Mental Health Services Act Funds 011,
315, and 316. A record signature copy of said contract and any amendments to be on
file in the City Clerk Department.
